---
title: 'I am a story teller! Time to flex my story telling...'
date: '2015-11-16T04:11:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4940814995210854467'
blogger_filename: '/2015/11/i-am-story-teller-time-to-flex-my-story.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Stories'
  - 'News Events'
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br />In the spirit of sharing what I'm up to this weekend, here is a short scene I posted on my fiction blog a while back. This is being used an example for a new trial project I'll talk about at the end of this post.<br /><br /><br /><h4>The Closet (originally posted on my fiction practice blog <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/05/the-closet.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</h4><br />It was the sound. It washed over his mind, like a shower on the inside. Water landing on pavement, concrete, and wood; as though beating a million tiny drums. The distant sound of the tiny river, washing down the sidewalks into the gutters. Ash always slept with the window open, but most especially on rainy nights.<br /><br />We are no closer now to getting to the bottom of this, than we were when it started.<br /><br />The rest of the house was asleep, but he couldn't find sleep. The air shifted slightly, and he felt he wasn't alone. Ash sat up straight, and at the edge of his bed sat a man. He was wearing blue jeans, a T-shirt, and a well kept beard. His hair was pulled back into a pony tail, and he smiled. The man's eyes held a piercing gaze, frightening and peaceful all at once.<br /><br />The man stood, and motioned to Ash. Almost unable to fight his own body, he rose to follow the man to the closet door. He reached out to open it, and a blinding light raced across the room. When Ash opened his eyes again, they were not in his room anymore. They were standing on a rooftop, overlooking New York City, and Herald Square.<br /><br />There, sitting on the ledge was a young man, maybe no more than 20. He was holding himself, rocking himself back and forth.<br /><br />"It'll all be over soon. It'll all be over soon." He repeated to himself over and over.<br /><br />Ash could see the Parade balloons in the distance. He knew this is what Eta had been talking about. Ash wanted to go stop him, but he couldn't move. His traveling companion put his arm on Ash's shoulder and smiled. He could feel the answer.<br /><br /><i>Not Now.</i><br /><br />The bright light flashed, and he found himself standing in front of his open closet, staring at the darkness. Ash turned back to his bed, and lay there for a few more hours. Sleep overcame him, and he rested. For the first time in a long time, confused, but peaceful, he rested.<br /><br /><h4><br />The Story Teller</h4><br /><br />I've decided that I am a story teller and creative writer. It's my niche, it's my hub, it's my repeating theme. It's the one thing I'm known for. The vice president of the company I worked for asked me to write up a situation because she liked my "story telling". My co-worker and desk neighbor would say: "Here comes another story".<br /><br />SO, I signed up for three websites today:<br /><br /><br /><ul><li><b>Fiverr</b>: I posted a Flash Fiction Gig (<a href="https://www.fiverr.com/s2/ea3438c382" target="_blank">here</a>), and set up my profile (<a href="https://www.fiverr.com/darrellwolfe777" target="_blank">here</a>)</li></ul><ul><li><b>UpWork</b>: I built my profile (<a href="https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~012a842aeeb37d544d" target="_blank">here</a>)</li></ul><ul><li><b>Freelancer</b>: I built my profile (<a href="https://www.freelancer.com/u/darrellwolfe.html" target="_blank">here</a>)</li></ul><br /><br /><br /><h4>Storyteller Profile</h4>Here is the profile I posted on the sites:<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">Darrell Wolfe&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq">Story Teller | INFJ | Intelection, Learner, Ideation, Achiever, Input<br /><br />I am a writer with an emphasis on story telling and creative writing: however, that doesn't mean I only write fiction. I my "day job", I work complaint resolution for a major financial institution. When a customer has a problem, I write summaries of the complaint, research, and resolution to "tell the story" to the executives.<br /><br />I also write for my owns blogs as a hobby.<br /><br />Email me for more information: darrell@darrellwolfe.com<br /><br />Check out my blogs for some writing examples:<br /><br /><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/">http://www.darrellwolfe.com</a><br /><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></blockquote><h4>Storyteller - Fiverr Offer:</h4><br />Here is the offer I posted on Fiverr. We'll see what comes of it.<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">I will write a flash fiction story for you<br /><br />I will write a short, personalized, flash fiction story just for you.<br />You provide me:<br />â€¢ up to three Characters<br />â€¢ one location<br />â€¢ one action (sequence)<br />â€¢ desired result: some idea of what you want out of it<br />I'll write you one scene of at least 300 words.<br /><br />Rules:<br />1. Content will be PG (no horror or erotica).<br />2. Conscience: I reserve the right to turn down any project or subject if it doesn't fit my style.<br />3. Edits: the product is final; however, if you really feel an edit is needed we can discuss a single edit.<br />4. Delivery: Will be delivered by email in a Word Doc and/or PDF.&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq">Example:<br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/05/the-closet.html">http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/05/the-closet.html</a></blockquote><br />I'm not really sure what I'm hoping to get out of this exercise, or what my end game is. I think I just wanted to try and take one step forward. Maybe in a year, I'll tell you how this went. Maybe sooner.<br /><br /><h4>Your Turn: What's your story?</h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-weight: normal;">Tell the LIFE community about a story you encountered this week, or an action you took, and what you learned from it.&nbsp;</blockquote><div><br /></div></h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div></h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b><br /></b><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Tweet These:</b><br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /></div></h4><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;"><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><i><br /></i><hr color="black" noshade="" /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><br /><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></a></div><div><br /><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">New Here? Start HERE</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a></span></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank">Sign up for email delivery of these posts here</a>.&nbsp;</li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Links to Resources</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</a>, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</li></ul><div></div><div></div></div><div><b>For more book suggestions, see my Amazon Store:</b></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-8fb3d7b755c7.gif" /></a></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><b>Other Hobby Sties by Darrell:</b><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>End Times Prophecy Study</li></ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>Fiction and Flash Fiction Practice</li></ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a></li><ul><li>Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy Fort Worth Texas. Reviews</li></ul></ul></div></div></h4><div><ul><ul></ul></ul></div>
